ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was recorded */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex demographic */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of DALYs */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "dalys_number" INTEGER /* DALYs number for the specific condition */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate associated with the health metric */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the disease */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the health data (e.g., WHO, CDC, local health department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location for geospatial analysis */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location for geospatial analysis */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location for demographic analysis */,
  "health_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex demographic */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex demographic (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause (e.g., Tuberculosis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., Infectious, Non-communicable, Injury) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, health care provider) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access level */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "access_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the user's access level expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric used in the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, comparison) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published, Archived) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health intervention */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric that prompted the intervention */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was initiated */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the intervention */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention report */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health intervention */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations or next steps from the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_reports_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)
